title: Peppery Spanish Oats Stir-fry
description: A peppery and energizing Spanish dish featuring oat milk, cured meats, and high-protein-friendly elements for a nutritious breakfast.

ingredients.name: Cured Meat (such as chorizo or salami)
ingredients.notes: Use thinly sliced for easier cooking.

ingredients.name: Pepper
ingredients.amount: 1 tsp ground cumin, 1 tsp chili powder, salt to taste

instructions: In a small bowl, mix together the ground cumin, chili powder, and salt.
Heat vegetable oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add sliced cured meat and cook until browned on all sides.
Add Spanish Oats to the skillet with the meat, stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, then add oat milk and cooked oats. Stir well to combine.
Turn down the heat and let it simmer for another 5-7 minutes or until the oats are fully cooked.
Stir in the mixture of ground cumin, chili powder, and salt into the dish and cook for an additional minute.
Garnish with fresh parsley if desired.
